## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test improvements
- [ ] Dependency / CI maintenance

## Testing

- [ ] Backend tests pass (`cd backend && pytest`)
- [ ] Frontend tests pass (`cd frontend && npm test`)
- [ ] Lint / typecheck pass (`ruff` / `mypy` / `npm run lint` / `npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated when behavior changes

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows existing style
- [ ] Self-reviewed the code
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] PR title uses Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, …) — see [RELEASING.md](../RELEASING.md)

## Related Issues

Closes #

## Additional Notes

Any additional information for reviewers.
